news.headline: Clearwater Paper releases 2024 Sustainability Report showing progress in 2023 and commitment to responsibility.
news.summary: In Spokane, Washington, Clearwater Paper showcased its achievements in 2023, highlighting its commitment to Everyday Responsibility. The report details significant milestones and impactful stories that demonstrate the company's dedication to sustainability.

news.headline: Data I/O Corp. reports Q3 2024 results: William Wentworth named CEO. Nasdaq: DAIO. Leading provider of data deployment solutions.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, Data I/O Corporation (NASDAQ: DAIO) has released its financial report for the 3rd quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company is a prominent global provider of advanced security and data deployment solutions for microcontrollers, security ICs, and memory devices. Following the quarter's end, on October 1, 2024, William Wentworth took on the role of CEO at Data I/O Corporation. Mr. Wentworth expressed his enthusiasm for his new position stating, "I am thrilled to have the opportunity to lead Data I/O."

news.headline: Redfin will announce Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, with a webcast at 1:30 pm PT/4:30 pm ET. Visit http://investors.redfin.com.
news.summary: Seattle-based Redfin Corporation (NASDAQ: RDFN) is set to announce its third-quarter 2024 results after markets close on November 7, 2024. A live webcast of the conference call discussing the results will be held at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can tune in via Redfin's Investor Relations website at http://investors.redfin.com. Redfin, a technology-driven real estate firm, aims to assist individuals in buying and selling properties effectively.

news.headline: McGrath RentCorp reports $266.8 million in Q3 2024 revenue, up 10% from Q3 2023, with net income of $149.3 million.
news.summary: Livermore, California - McGrath RentCorp, a prominent business-to-business rental firm in North America, shared their financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. Total revenues from ongoing operations reached $266.8 million during this period, marking a 10% growth from the third quarter of 2023. The company disclosed a net income of $149.3 million, which translates to $6.08 per diluted share in the third quarter of 2024, showcasing a remarkable performance compared to previous data.

news.headline: Nerdy to announce Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024 after market closes; conference call at 5pm ET to discuss.
news.summary: Nerdy Inc., a top platform for live online learning, revealed that it will unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024, after the U.S. stock market closes. The announcement will include data for the period ending September 30, 2024. Nerdy's stock, listed as NRDY on NYSE, will be a focus during this release. Subsequently, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, on the same day, Nerdy's management will conduct a conference call and webcast to elaborate on the financial and operational outcomes. Those interested in participating from the U.S. can tune in to the discussion.

news.headline: Texas Roadhouse reports Q3 2024 results for 13 and 39 weeks ending Sept 24, 2024. (24 words)
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on October 24, 2024, Texas Roadhouse, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TXRH) revealed its financial performance for the 13 and 39 weeks concluding on September 24, 2024.

news.headline: Jeffs’ Brands granted extension for meeting NASDAQ’s minimum bid price requirement.
news.summary: A recent report reveals shocking statistics about the global plastic waste crisis. It is estimated that over 8 million tons of plastic waste ends up in the ocean every year, threatening marine life and ecosystems. Only 9% of plastic waste has been recycled globally, with the rest either incinerated, dumped in landfills, or left uncollected. The report highlights the urgent need for countries to take action to reduce plastic waste and increase recycling efforts to prevent further damage to the environment.

news.headline: Navitas Semiconductor (Nasdaq: NVTS) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 4th, 2024 via webcast at 2:00 p.m. Pacific/5:00 p.m. Eastern.
news.summary: In Torrance, California, on October 24, 2024, Navitas Semiconductor (Nasdaq: NVTS) revealed plans to release its third-quarter 2024 financial results after markets shut on November 4, 2024. Following that, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific / 5:00 p.m. Eastern on the same day, company management will conduct a conference call and live webcast. This event is for presenting the financial results and engaging with financial analysts, discussing any queries they may have.

news.headline: Perfect Moment Ltd. (NYSE American: PMNT) will present at LD Micro Main Event XVII on October 30, 2024, at 10:30 a.m. PT.
news.summary: Luxury skiwear and lifestyle brand, Perfect Moment Ltd. (NYSE American: PMNT), known for its blend of technical excellence and fashion-forward designs, will be participating in two investor conferences this October. The company is set to present at the LD Micro Main Event XVII scheduled from October 28-30, 2024. The event will feature 1x1 meetings, company presentations, and panel discussions. Perfect Moment Ltd.'s presentation is scheduled for Wednesday, October 30, at 10:30 a.m. Pacific time (1:30 p.m. Eastern time). The conferences will take place at Luxe Ho.

news.headline: BayFirst Financial Corp. saw a 31.3% increase in net income in Q3 2024, reaching $1.1 million. Loans and deposits also rose. Net interest margin decreased slightly to 3.34%. Total assets increased to $1.25 billion. The Bank's Tier 1 leverage ratio was 8.41%. Non-performing assets increased to 1.38%. The Bank declared a Q4 cash dividend of $0.08 per common share. The management will host a conference call on October 25, 2024.
news.summary: BayFirst Financial Corp, the parent company of BayFirst National Bank, reported a net income of $1.1 million for Q3 2024, a 31.3% increase from Q2 2024. The company's government-guaranteed loan origination team produced $94.4 million in new loans, a slight decrease from the previous quarter but an increase in loans held for investment. Deposits rose by $69.8 million during Q3 2024, with total assets reaching $1.25 billion. Additionally, the company's Tier 1 leverage ratio was 8.41%, and the diluted common share earnings were $0.18. Overall, BayFirst Financial Corp displayed growth in loans, assets, and profitability over the past year.

news.headline: Global Home Fire Sprinklers Market to increase by $988.8M from 2024-2028, driven by urbanization, infrastructure, and AI trends.
news.summary: The market landscape is being transformed by AI, with the Global Home Fire Sprinklers Market anticipated to expand by USD 988.8 million between 2024 and 2028. Technavio projects a growth rate of 10.9% for the market during this period.

news.headline: Leidos recognized by Defense Innovation Unit for completing milestones in EV Charging as a Service project.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Reston, Virginia, Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) disclosed its reception of a success memorandum from the Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) for achieving significant milestones in its Electric Vehicle Charging as a Service (EV CaaS) prototype for the Department of the Air Force.

news.headline: Amgen will report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024, after US market close. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: In Thousand Oaks, California, on October 24, 2024, Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) disclosed its plans to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on October 30, 2024, after the U.S. financial markets close. This announcement will be accompanied by a conference call.

news.headline: Founder Group Limited closes IPO with 1,218,750 ordinary shares at $4.00 each, totaling $4.875 million; ticker symbol “FGL.”
news.summary: In Selangor, Malaysia, on October 24, 2024, Founder Group Limited, a company specializing in engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning solutions for solar PV facilities, announced the completion of its initial public offering. The offering included 1,218,750 ordinary shares priced at $4.00 per share, generating total gross proceeds of $4.875 million for the Company, excluding underwriting discounts and offering expenses. The shares commenced trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on October 23, 2024, under the ticker symbol "FGL."

news.headline: Partnership announced between Common Crawl Foundation and Constellation Network to merge blockchain and AI technologies. #technews
news.summary: Constellation Network and the Common Crawl Foundation are collaborating to transform web data accessibility and advance AI development using blockchain technology. The Common Crawl Foundation, established in 2007 as a non-profit organization, is focused on offering a replicated version of the web to bolster innovation. This partnership aims to harness the potential of blockchain to improve data accessibility and further AI research. The initiative, based in San Francisco, was announced on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Gándara Mental Health Center notifies patients of data breach affecting personal health information.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Springfield, Massachusetts, Gándara Mental Health Center encountered a data breach, compromising personal and/or protected health information of specific current and past patients. The center has notified these individuals about the security incident.

news.headline: Lyell Immunopharma acquires ImmPACT Bio, focusing on IMPT-314 for hematologic malignancies, including large B-cell lymphoma. Strengthening clinical pipeline.
news.summary: Lyell Immunopharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYEL) based in South San Francisco, California, revealed on October 24, 2024, its definitive acquisition agreement of ImmPACT Bio USA Inc., a clinical-stage biotech company. The acquisition includes ImmPACT’s lead program IMPT-314, a CD19/20-targeting CAR T-cell product aimed for hematologic malignancies like large B-cell lymphoma. IMPT-314 stands out for its dual-targeting CAR T-cell design and enhanced CAR T-cell persistence by focusing on naïve and central memory T cells during manufacturing, aiming to surpass the effectiveness of current CD19 CAR T-cell therapies. This strategic move is set to fortify Lyell’s clinical-stage pipeline for next-gen CAR T-cell therapies, alongside its cutting-edge technologies geared towards producing enduring, functional T cells for improved patient outcomes against solid tumors and hematologic malignancies.

news.headline: Zynex Inc. (ZYXI) reports Q3 2024 financial results focusing on non-invasive medical devices for pain management.
news.summary: Today, in Englewood, Colorado, Zynex, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZYXI), a leading medical technology firm, disclosed its financial status for the day. Zynex is renowned for its production and distribution of non-invasive medical equipment tailored for pain relief, rehabilitation, and patient tracking.

news.headline: UP Fintech closes follow-on public offering of 15 million ADSs at US$6.25 each; potential for additional 2.25 million.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, UP Fintech Holding Limited (Nasdaq: TIGR), a prominent online brokerage firm catering to global investors, concluded its public offering of 15,000,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs), with each ADS representing 15 Class A ordinary shares of the Company. The offering was priced at US$6.25 per ADS. Additionally, the underwriters hold the option to acquire up to 2,250,000 more ADSs from the Company at the same public offering price, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions, exercisable within 20 days from the prospectus supplement date.

news.headline: Nanophase Technologies (OTCQB: NANX) to release Q3 2024 financials on Oct 30, with investor call on Oct 31.
news.summary: In Romeoville, Illinois, on October 24, 2024, Nanophase Technologies Corporation (OTCQB: NANX), known for its mineral-based health care products in beauty and life sciences, will release its financial report for the Third Quarter of 2024 after market hours on October 30. An investor conference call will take place on October 31 to discuss these financial updates.

news.headline: Mauro Gregorio appointed to Board of Directors at Radius Recycling, Inc.; effective November 1, 2024; serving on key committees.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, on October 24, 2024, Radius Recycling, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDUS) has revealed that Mauro Gregorio, the former President of the Performance Materials & Coatings Division at Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW), will join as a new independent director. The appointment is set to take effect on November 1, 2024. Mr. Gregorio will play a role on the Audit Committee and the Compensation and Human Resources Committee of the Board.

news.headline: Amlan and VetPro form distributor alliance in Northern Brazil, focusing on innovative products like Calibrin-Z® and Varium®.
news.summary: Amlan® International, a leading animal health company under Oil-Dri® Corporation of America (NYSE: ODC), has recently teamed up with VetPro, a new distributor in Brazil. This partnership aims to enhance the distribution of Amlan’s mineral-based feed additives for poultry and livestock health in the Brazilian market, with a focus on products like Calibrin-Z® and Varium®. VetPro, based in North-East Brazil, is expected to significantly contribute to expanding Amlan’s presence in the region and meeting the needs of the Northern Brazilian market. The collaboration is set to drive the adoption of these innovative products and bolster Amlan’s growth in Brazil.

news.headline: Heartland Financial USA, Inc. declares $0.30/share common stock dividend, payable to stockholders on Nov. 26, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, financial company Heartland Financial USA, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTLF), known as HTLF, disclosed that its Board of Directors has greenlit a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share for common stock. This dividend will be distributed on November 26, 2024, to shareholders recorded at the end of business on November 12, 2024.

news.headline: Teknova to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, for the period ended Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Hollister, California, on October 24, 2024, Alpha Teknova, Inc. ("Teknova") revealed plans to release its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. Teknova, a key supplier of essential reagents for advancing new treatments, vaccines, and molecular diagnostics, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol TKNO, stated that the report will be disclosed on Thursday, November 7, 2024. This announcement will occur after the market closes on that day.

news.headline: Astec declares quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share, payable on Nov 27, 2024 to shareholders on record as of Nov 13, 2024.
news.summary: Astec Industries, Inc., headquartered in Chattanooga, Tennessee, disclosed on October 24, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share for its shareholders. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed around November 27, 2024, to all shareholders of record as of the market close on November 13, 2024. Astec Industries, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ASTE.

news.headline: Riverview Bancorp's net income was $1.6 million in the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, down from $2.5 million in the same quarter a year ago.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Wash., on October 24, 2024, Riverview Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq GSM: RVSB) announced its latest financial results. The Company reported earnings of $1.6 million, translating to $0.07 per diluted share, for the second fiscal quarter ending on September 30, 2024. This marks a decrease from the $2.5 million earnings, equating to $0.12 per diluted share, recorded in the second fiscal quarter of the previous year.

news.headline: BayFirst Financial Corp. saw a 31.3% increase in net income in Q3 2024, reaching $1.1 million ($0.18 per share).
news.summary: BayFirst Financial Corp., based in St. Petersburg, announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company, which owns BayFirst National Bank, reported a net income of $1.1 million for the quarter, equivalent to $0.18 per diluted common share. This marked a notable 31.3% growth compared to the previous quarter's net income of $0.9 million, or $0.12 per diluted common share.

news.headline: First Central Savings Bank's Q3 2024 cash earnings hit $1.9M ($0.18 EPS), with notable non-interest income increase and stable liquidity.
Abstract presented at PFD Week 2024 in Washington reveals model predicting female incontinence treatment success.
news.summary: In Washington, a new model has been developed to assist clinicians in predicting treatment success for female incontinence. This innovation in digital health aims to provide accurate insights for healthcare professionals to enhance patient care. The model utilizes advanced technology to analyze data and forecast outcomes, potentially revolutionizing the approach to treating this condition. This development signifies a significant advancement in the medical field and has the potential to benefit countless women suffering from incontinence.

news.headline: Global Design Initiative for Refugee Children (GDIRC) gets $100,000 grant to make portable play for refugee kids.
news.summary: In Boston on October 24, 2024, the Global Design Initiative for Refugee Children (GDIRC) shared news of a major advancement in their efforts to assist refugee children. Following a substantial $100,000 donation from the Schooner Foundation, GDIRC is set to create groundbreaking initiatives to aid...

news.headline: Cat-themed cryptocurrencies Popcat and cat in a dogs world have surged, approaching a $5 billion market cap. Dogecoin and Shiba Inu have trailed behind, unable to match the gains of these feline coins. Popcat flipped Bonk to become the second-largest meme coin on the Solana network, with a 7.7% 24-hour gain. Mew crossed a $1 billion valuation, a remarkable achievement for a meme coin.
news.summary: Cat-themed cryptocurrencies Popcat (POPCAT) and Cat In A Dogs World (MEW) have surged as top performers in the crypto market. Cat coins now boast a combined market cap nearing $5 billion, showing a 7.7% increase in the past day. Popcat has overtaken Bonk to become the second largest meme coin on the Solana network with MEW also hitting a milestone by surpassing a $1 billion valuation. Meanwhile, leading memes Dogecoin and Shiba Inu have shown slower growth. Dogecoin is priced at $0.1399 with a market cap of $20.5 billion, marking a 2.9% increase in the last 24 hours and 15.2% over the past week. Shiba Inu stands at $0.00001781, with a market cap of $10.5 billion, up by 2.7% in the past day and 0.7% over the week. Popcat, priced at $1.59, holds a market cap of $1.56 billion, showing a notable 12.2% growth in the last 24 hours and a 22% increase over the week. The popularity of cat-related cryptocurrencies has overshadowed that of other established meme coins.

news.headline: Nasdaq and Tesla rise; ServiceNow rallies. Gold miner triggers sell rule. Jobless claims down. Live stock market coverage.
news.summary: Early on Thursday, the stock market exhibited primarily bullish behavior with a rise in weekly jobless claims and a flurry of earnings reports. The Nasdaq maintained its gains while Tesla saw a significant increase. ServiceNow also experienced a rally. However, one gold miner prompted a sell rule. Live coverage of these events is available on Investor's Business Daily. This positive trend reflects growing confidence in the market, with investors closely monitoring these developments. The market's performance is indicative of a robust economic outlook, with significant movements in key stock indicators. Be sure to stay updated on the latest market developments to make informed investment decisions.

news.headline: Government's crypto wallet tied to Bitfinex hack drained of $20M in suspicious transactions on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, a United States government wallet connected to the hack of the Bitfinex exchange experienced suspicious transactions that led to its depletion.

news.headline: Anthem Blue Cross & Blue Shield partners with Healthy Birth Day to expand Count the Kicks program in NY, aiming to prevent 1 in 4 stillbirths.
news.summary: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield Foundation recently announced a collaboration with Healthy Birth Day, Inc. to enhance the evidence-based Count the Kicks stillbirth prevention initiative in Bronx, Kings, and Queens counties within New York state. This program intends to inform soon-to-be parents about the significance of tracking their baby’s movements during the final trimester of pregnancy. Studies indicate that a minimum of 25% of stillbirth cases can be avoided through proper parental education on this crucial matter.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
Loggerhead sea turtle released off San Diego coast by VAMMR, SeaWorld San Diego Rescue, and Turtles Fly Too. Collaboration for marine life conservation.
news.summary: In a joint effort to safeguard endangered species and conserve marine life, various groups in San Diego collaborated on Oct. 24, 2024. The teams involved included the Vancouver Aquarium Marine Mammal Rescue Society (VAMMR), SeaWorld San Diego Rescue, and Turtles Fly Too. Their recent collective actions involved the smooth transfer of rescued animals.

news.headline: Adena Health in Chillicothe, OH, elevating perinatal care standards at ARMC's Women and Children's department.
news.summary: In Chillicothe, Ohio on October 24, 2024, families seeking the best care for childbirth are turning to the Women and Children's department at Adena Regional Medical Center (ARMC). This department is staffed with dedicated clinicians and staff who ensure the highest quality care for mothers and their babies.

news.headline: 407 International Inc. reports Q3 revenue growth of 16% to $487.1 million, net income up 16% to $212.3 million. Total trips up 2%, EBITDA at $431.0 million. Dividend declared at $0.903 per share. Celebrated 25th anniversary with customers and raised $40,000 for United Way. Awarded 2024 DEI Award.
news.summary: 407 International Inc. reported a 16% increase in revenues for the third quarter of 2024, totaling $487.1 million. Net income also saw a 16% increase to $212.3 million compared to the same period in 2023. EBITDA for the quarter was $431.0 million, up 16% from last year. The average workday trips were 387,432, with total trips up by 2% and vehicle kilometers traveled up by 3% compared to the third quarter of 2023. The company declared a dividend of $0.903 per common share. 407 ETR celebrated its 25th anniversary with a customer contest generating over 225,000 entries, raising $40,000 for charity. The company received the 2024 DEI Award for promoting diversity and inclusion. In community initiatives, they hosted the 407 ETR Keep Moving Clinic and partnered with Tennis Canada for a youth sports event.

news.headline: Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) reports Q3 2024 net income of $1,853,000. CEO Anthony J. Gabello shares results.
news.summary: In Wyalusing, Pennsylvania, on October 24, 2024, Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) disclosed their third-quarter 2024 figures. Anthony J. Gabello, the President and CEO of Peoples Ltd., the parent company of PS Bank, unveiled that the net income for the third quarter reached $1,853,000.

news.headline: Columbia Sportswear appoints new creative agency and marketing head. Enhancing brand strategy with unique approach.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Columbia Sportswear Company (Nasdaq: COLM) has revealed a significant update in their marketing strategy. The global company specializing in outdoor apparel, footwear, accessories, and equipment products, shared news of partnering with a new creative agency and appointing fresh leadership to steer the brand's creative direction. With a focus on leveraging the company's rich heritage spanning eighty-six years, the aim is to enhance the Columbia brand's identity and presence in the market.

news.headline: D.A. Davidson advises Allivet on sale to Tractor Supply Company. Allivet is an online pet pharmacy founded in 1992.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, D.A. Davidson revealed that it was the sole financial advisor for the sale of Allivet, Inc. ("Allivet"), an online pet pharmacy. Allivet, established in 1992, offers medications and supplements for pets. The company, owned by Peninsula Capital Partners, is set to be acquired by Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO). Tractor Supply is a prominent company that specializes in pet products. This acquisition marks a significant move in the pet pharmacy industry.

news.headline: InnoVision Marketing Group in San Diego recognized as top place to work in Southern California by Best Places to Work SoCal.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, InnoVision Marketing Group, a San Diego-based company known for its full-service marketing and global presence, proudly announced its recent accolade of being named one of the top employers in Southern California by Best Places to Work SoCal. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to providing an exceptional work environment.

news.headline: Beef brand shares spooky season recipes for satisfying meals before Halloween night in Denver, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Denver, the Beef. It's What's For Dinner. brand released recipes to enjoy before a night of trick-or-treating. Instead of focusing solely on candy, these recipes provide hearty options to satisfy hunger. These meal ideas aim to keep trick-or-treaters energized and full during their festive activities. Get ready to indulge in delicious beef-filled dishes that will ensure a spooktacular evening.

news.headline: PCF Insurance Services rebrands to Trucordia, a top 20 U.S. brokerage, under CEO Felix Morgan in Lindon, Utah.

This transformation includes a rebrand to Trucordia effective immediately. The new name, Trucordia, symbolizes the coming together of...
